mission.title: lima: Implement the snapshot commands
mission.description:
For making qcow2 snapshots of the running virtual machine.

It is possible to make multiple snapshots, in the diffdisk.

Closes #1051

----

`limactl start`

`limactl snapshot create default --tag snap`

`limactl snapshot list default`

`limactl snapshot apply default --tag snap`

`limactl stop`

`limactl snapshot delete default --tag snap`

resolution.summary:
Allows linking only the hostagent with the driver libraries, while keeping the limactl smaller and faster to start up.

Probably needs to live in "libexec" or something like that ? And maybe the subcommand should be renamed, too.

Closes #1209
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
